name: katarina-skills
description: A bundle of 17 generative, interactive, and visualization skills for Claude Code: marching-squares contours, filled-band topology, 3D terrain with overlay lines, 3D halftone surface, minimap/radar HUDs, generative tree meshes, highlightable grass fields, swimming fish tanks, fluid mosaic blob, lo-fi cursor birds, cursor ripple field, realtime presence pings, proximity audio mapping, MediaPipe gesture classification, image palette extraction, image silhouette extraction, and rubato-probability event rolls.
